channel.title: Alan Gemmell MP
channel.description: Alan Gemmell is the Member of Parliament for Central Ayrshire. Working and delivering for our towns and villages.

item.title: Letter to South Ayrshire Council over Diving Club cuts
item.description: Photo: Ayr Diving Club On Monday, along with Elaine Stewart MP, I wrote to the Chief Executive of South Ayrshire Council over concerns about cuts in their budget that could lead to the phasing out of Ayr Diving Club. Members, and parents of members, of Ayr Diving Club have written to use concerned that cuts in the South Ayrshire Council budget could lead to the phasing out of the club. As you may know, the club operated our of the Citadel leisure centre. The pool at the Citadel is one of four...
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Campaign win for safer streets in
item.description: Campaign success! I’m delighted to have secured a reduction in the speed limit on the B743 from 60 to 40 miles per hour - ending a decade-long campaign by residents. After I held a public meeting on the issue earlier this year, I worked with Sergeant Slaven to ensure road safety measures were introduced. This change will make this road safer for everyone who uses it. I met with residents in St Quivox earlier today to celebrate!
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Tell the SNP to stop the cuts to our crossing patrols
item.description: I've been campaigning with Girdle Toll parents to stop the SNP administration at North Ayrshire Council from cutting June and 15 other crossing patrols. Please join almost 1000 people who have signed their petition online or at the local shops. https://www.change.org/.../keep-our-kids-safe-save-june ... June's been keeping Girdle Toll children safe for 25 years - and we want her to stay.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: North Ayrshire Ukrainian Community
item.description: Thank you to the representatives of the Ukrainian community in North Ayrshire who came to my surgery today. Great to have a British Council link with Svitlana who worked on projects with them in Ukraine. Thanks to Mila too! https://www.instagram.com/milascakeanddessert/
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to Harbourside Men's Shed
item.description: Thanks to Harbourside Men's Shed for inviting me over for a lovely coffee and chat this morning about the work that they are doing.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: World Book Day 2024
item.description: Happy World Book Day! It was great to join The Publishers Association in Parliament earlier this week to hear about their work to encourage more children and young people to read for fun.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Christmas Card Competition '24
item.description: Thank you to South Ayrshire Council libraries in Ayr, Prestwick and Troon for these brilliant displays of entries to my first Christmas Card competition. Well done to Max, Jasmine and Gabriella - the winners of this year’s competition.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Christmas Visit to Irvine Beat FM
item.description: Thanks Eddie and Irvine Beat Fm for playing some of my fav Christmas tunes - Step Into Christmas; Stay Another Day; and, Santa Can’t you Hear me. about one hour in here ⬇️⬇️⬇️ https://player.autopod.xyz/770845 Happy Christmas !!!!
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Troon Cenotaph Re-dedication
item.description: I was proud to attend the re-dedication of Troon Cenotaph on its 100th anniversary alongside Vice Admiral Sir Thomas Baird. Thank you to Royal British Legion, Troon, the organisers and everyone who attended. Photo: Colin McMillan
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Winter Food Collection
item.description: Thanks to Tesco Irvine for this year's Winter Food Collection. I dropped off a donation this weekend.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Monkton Milers Santa Dash
item.description: What a great way to start Sunday and December with , Caroline+ & Heather and the Monkton Milers Jog Scotland Santa Dash! Thanks to all the organisers - and runners - who have raised over £3000 for Diabetes UK.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Tarbolton Christmas Celebrations
item.description: Santa’s been busy in Ayrshire this weekend. Thanks to Tarbolton Community Council, the brilliant Dunaskin Doon Band, and all the organisers, at this year’s Christmas lights switch on!
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Remembrance Services 2024
item.description: It was a privilege to take part in the Troon and Prestwick Remembrance Services - and to lay a wreath in Irvine. Thank you to all the organisers and everyone who attended. We will remember them.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to BAE Systems and NATS Air Traffic Control
item.description: I’ve spent the day with BAE Systems & NATS Air Traffic Control UK some of our most important, long-term employers as well as XLCC- one of our newest. Our first The Labour Party budget means we can fix the foundations of our country & work to bring investment and jobs here in Central Ayrshire.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visiting workers at ABP in Troon
item.description: In Troon to hear how ABP’s 21 ports contribute £15bn to the UK economy & support over 200k jobs. Their Timberlink project has transported 100k tonnes of timber from across West Scotland to Ayr&Troon &saved over 1m miles each year. And chips at the #WeeHurrie!
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to Spirit Aerosystems
item.description: Great visit to Spirit AeroSystems in Prestwick to hear the future plans for this global, and world-class, business and its 1200 workers. Prestwick is home to Scotland’s largest aerospace hub & Spirit a core part of our local economy.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to River Garden
item.description: I met some of the residents, staff and trustees of River Garden in Auchincruive yesterday to understand more about their recovery model and why we need their important work to continue and this centre to succeed.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to Kyiv
item.description: I’ve spent the last few days in Kyiv with Labour MPs meeting politicians, policy makers & the military. Chairman of the Verkhovna Rada of Ukraine, Ruslan Stefanchuk, thanked the UK for our continued support. I’m inspired by the Ukrainians’ bravery & determination to keep their country free.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to Irvine Burns Club
item.description: After a tour of the Wellwood Burns Centre, I was delighted to become a member of Irvine Burns Club and present the President with an official copy of my first speech in Parliament, which mentions Burns’ connections with our town.
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp

item.title: Visit to RAFA Club of Ayr & Prestwick
item.description: Thank you to RAFA Club of Ayr & Prestwick chairman Kevin Dunlop, branch chairman Alex Lobban as well as veterans and member - who chatted to me on Sunday. Thank you for all you do for veterans and the local community. rafaclub.co.uk
item.dc:creator: alangemmellmp
